description: Fix 4 issues from code review: (1) updateProduct/updateBlog throw on 0 rows affected, (2) remove error swallowing in defaultLeadSink.record(), (3) add migration path for existing DBs without id column in leads table, (4) remove dead insertLead import from admin.ts.
steps: Step 1 - In lib/db.ts: updateProduct and updateBlog should check the changes property from db.run() result, throw Error('Product not found') or Error('Blog not found') when changes === 0.
Step 2 - In lib/lead-sink.ts: Remove try/catch around insertLead so errors propagate to the caller.

Step 3 - In lib/db.ts getDb(): After CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statements, add a migration check that queries sqlite_master for the leads table schema. If it lacks 'id TEXT PRIMARY KEY', create leads_new with correct schema, copy data, drop old, rename.
Step 4 - In app/actions/admin.ts: Remove unused insertLead from the import statement.
acceptance_criteria: updateProduct throws 'Product not found' when slug does not exist
updateBlog throws 'Blog not found' when slug does not exist
defaultLeadSink.record() propagates insert errors to caller
getDb() migrates an existing leads table that lacks an id column
TypeScript compiles without errors in source files
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v '__tests__' (no errors in source files)
